title: Strategic Collaboration: South Korea and France's Innovation Pursuit
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung emphasized that ties with France should evolve from partnership to strategic collaboration, highlighting artificial intelligence and nuclear energy as crucial to innovation. French President Emmanuel Macron's two-day visit to South Korea underscores these themes of advancing bilateral alliances.
content: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung has called for deeper ties with France, advocating for a shift from mere partnership to strategic collaboration. Key areas of focus include artificial intelligence and nuclear energy, both considered essential for... [497 chars]

title: Fox News Poll: Broad anxiety about AI doesn’t extend to jobs
description: A new poll finds 66% of voters are concerned about artificial intelligence, up from 56% in 2023, even as most aren't worried about losing their own jobs.
content:
As artificial intelligence continues to expand into homes and the workplace, voters are less concerned about it taking their jobs and more worried about its overall influence.
The latest Fox News Poll finds 66% of registered voters are concerned abou... [3202 chars]

title: Handshakes aren’t enough: Why Australia must play hardball on AI
description: Every major artificial intelligence firm wants our land and grid. We should negotiate for enforceable commitments rather than non-binding memorandums.
content: Dario Amodei spent Wednesday in Canberra signing the first memorandum of understanding under the National AI Plan with Prime Minister Anthony Albanese, meeting Treasurer Jim Chalmers, and telling MPs at the Anthropic Futures Forum that democracies mu... [362 chars]

title: Commentary: India’s gas shortage will make dal compete with data
description: Silicon Valley firms want to tap India’s solar power, but New Delhi must prioritise human welfare over artificial intelligence, says Andy Mukherjee for Bloomberg Opinion.
content: HONG KONG: With the war in Iran now in its second month, India’s cooking gas shortage is turning serious. Policymakers must view this as more than a temporary blip; it is a crisis that may permanently shift how the world’s most-populous nation consum... [4193 chars]

description: A top Anthropic PBC executive expects the company’s general-purpose artificial intelligence agent, Cowork, to reach a wider market than Claude Code, the hit product that helped turn the startup into an AI juggernaut.

title: AI giant Anthropic says it is 'exploring' Australia data center investments
description: Artificial intelligence giant Anthropic is eyeing data center investments in Australia, saying Wednesday the nation was a "natural partner" for work in the booming sector.
